label: Managed IT Services
shortDesc: 24/7 proactive monitoring, helpdesk support, network management, and complete IT operations management with guaranteed SLAs.

label: Cloud Infrastructure
shortDesc: Seamless migration to AWS, Azure, or GCP. Multi-cloud architecture, cost optimization, and 24/7 cloud operations management.

label: Artificial Intelligence
shortDesc: Custom ML models, intelligent automation, predictive analytics, and AI-powered business intelligence that transform your operations.

label: Cyber Security
shortDesc: End-to-end security with threat detection, SOC monitoring, penetration testing, compliance management, and incident response.

label: Hardware Solutions
shortDesc: Enterprise hardware procurement, deployment, and lifecycle management. Dell, HP, Cisco certified partners with best-in-class pricing.

label: Custom Software Dev
shortDesc: Bespoke enterprise applications, web platforms, mobile apps, and API integrations built with modern tech stacks and agile methodology.
